_note: MOCK fixture — NOT captured from a live source. The Booli searchSold GraphQL endpoint is Cloudflare-managed-challenge protected and could not be reached from any in-session transport (direct fetch, browser-headers, Apify residential proxy, or in-browser page-context fetch on Apify Playwright). See .planning/phases/03-market-context/03-SPIKE.md. This payload mirrors the documented searchSold result shape (soldPrice.raw / soldSqmPrice.raw / soldDate / livingArea.raw / rooms.raw) so Plan 04 tests and normalizeSoldOutput can be built against a realistic structure. Values are synthetic (no real address/PII). Shipping PRICE-01 on this mock = PRICE-01-INCOMPLETE per Plan 06 Task 3 live gate.
_source_shape: Booli GraphQL query SearchSold(input:{areaId,page,filters,sort}){ totalCount result{ soldPrice{raw} soldSqmPrice{raw} soldDate livingArea{raw} rooms{raw} } }
